name: Spiced Mincemeat Squares
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Firmly packed light brown sugar
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, combine flour, cinnamon, nutmeg and baking soda; set aside.
2. In a medium bowl with electric mixer at medium speed, beat margarine and brown sugar until creamy. Beat in egg. Add flour mixture, mincemeat and bran. Spread into greased 9x9 inches baking pan.
3. Bake at 400°F for 20-25 minutes or until knife inserted in center comes out clean.
4. Cool on wire rack. Drizzle with Confectioners' Sugar Glaze.
5. Cut into squares. Store in an airtight container.
Makes 16 squares.
